result:
# Introducing Smart Drafts: Never Stare at a Blank Page Again

We've all been there. You open a new document, the cursor blinks, and suddenly every good idea you had in the shower evaporates. The blank page is one of the oldest problems in writing, and for a while now, we've watched our users wrestle with it — pausing mid-flow, tabbing away, coming back ten minutes later no closer to a first sentence. Smart Drafts is our answer. It's designed to turn that intimidating white space into a running start.

Here's how it works. When you create a new document, you'll see a new **Smart Draft** option right next to the blank template. Give your doc a title, click once, and we'll generate a tailored outline based on what you typed and the recent documents you've been working on. Writing a project kickoff? You'll get sections for goals, stakeholders, and timelines. Drafting a postmortem? Expect a root-cause framework ready to fill in. Nothing is locked — every heading, bullet, and suggestion is fully editable, so you stay in the driver's seat. It's scaffolding, not autopilot.

This is just the first step. Over the coming months, we're building **custom voice training** so Smart Drafts don't just know the shape of your document, but the sound of *you* — your phrasing, your structure, the little turns that make your writing feel like yours. We can't wait to share more soon. In the meantime, give Smart Drafts a try on your next doc and let us know what you think. As always, thank you for writing with us.

# Introducing Smart Drafts: Never Stare at a Blank Page Again

We've all been there. You open a new document, the cursor blinks, and suddenly every good idea you had in the shower evaporates. The blank page is one of the oldest problems in writing, and for a while now, we've watched our users wrestle with it — pausing mid-flow, tabbing away, coming back ten minutes later no closer to a first sentence. Smart Drafts is our answer. It's designed to turn that intimidating white space into a running start.

Here's how it works. When you create a new document, you'll see a new **Smart Draft** option right next to the blank template. Give your doc a title, click once, and we'll generate a tailored outline based on what you typed and the recent documents you've been working on. Writing a project kickoff? You'll get sections for goals, stakeholders, and timelines. Drafting a postmortem? Expect a root-cause framework ready to fill in. Nothing is locked — every heading, bullet, and suggestion is fully editable, so you stay in the driver's seat. It's scaffolding, not autopilot.

This is just the first step. Over the coming months, we're building **custom voice training** so Smart Drafts don't just know the shape of your document, but the sound of *you* — your phrasing, your structure, the little turns that make your writing feel like yours. We can't wait to share more soon. In the meantime, give Smart Drafts a try on your next doc and let us know what you think. As always, thank you for writing with us.
